paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.58, representing a 1.13% decrease from the prior close and a 26.7% decrease over the last 22 sessions.

The recent news headlines are focused on the company's announcement of its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, scheduled for August 13, 2026, as well as the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns and the completion of a $375 million convertible senior notes offering.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K filing announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
